title: Inside Active: Baillie Gifford’s Coutts, Burns Look Beyond US
title_cn: 内部活跃：Baillie Gifford 的 Coutts、Burns 放眼美国以外
summary: Europe and Japan’s earnings outlooks have improved, with double-digit growth expectations, though upgrades are concentrated in technology and energy, while inflation pressures could weigh on valuations. In this episode of Inside Active, host David Cohne, mutual fund and active management analyst at Bloomberg Intelligence, and co-host Laurent Douillet, senior equity strategist at BI, speak with Tom Coutts and Lawrence Burns, portfolio managers at Baillie Gifford, and subadvisers on the Vanguard I

title: Asian Stocks Poised to Gain as AI Rally Extends: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着人工智能涨势的延续，亚洲股市有望上涨：市场总结
summary: Asian stocks were set to track Wall Street higher as renewed enthusiasm for the artificial-intelligence trade drove the S&P 500 to a ninth day of gains. Oil steadied as conflicting signals clouded the outlook for a US-Iran deal.

title: Oil Holds Two-Day Gain on Discordant US-Iran Peace Talk Reports
title_cn: 由于美伊和谈报告不一致，油价连续两天上涨
summary: Oil steadied after rising in the previous two sessions, as contradictory headlines on the prospects of a US-Iran peace deal boost price swings.

title: Venezuela Moves to Open Power Sector to Private Investment
title_cn: 委内瑞拉向私人投资开放电力行业
summary: Venezuela’s National Assembly debated a reform that would open the country’s electricity sector to private investment, allowing companies to generate, distribute and sell power under government concessions after more than 15 years of state control.

title: GameStop Posted Its Highest Profit Ever By Selling Action Figures and Cards
title_cn: GameStop 通过销售人偶和卡片实现了有史以来最高的利润
summary: GameStop Corp. shares climbed as much as 13% in after-hours trading after the video-game retailer reported a record quarterly profit driven by its collectibles business.

title: Anthopic, OpenAI Should Not Be Allowed to IPO, Says Ed Zitron
title_cn: Ed Zitron 表示 Anthopic 和 OpenAI 不应被允许 IPO
summary: Ed Zitron, CEO at EZ Primary Research, said that the risk of balancing the equity market on record public offerings for AI companies that have never reported profit is a dangerous proposition and that those companies should not be allowed to IPO. Zitron, an AI skeptic, said that many of these companies will not last in the long term. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin’s Inflation-Hedging Promise in Tatters After Plunge
title_cn: 暴跌后比特币的通胀对冲承诺破灭
summary: Bitcoin has fallen 36% over the past year and slipped below $70,000 this week, extending a retreat that is undermining several of the arguments that helped carry the cryptocurrency into the financial mainstream.

title: How China’s Wealthy Sidestep Strict Rules to Get Money Out of the Country
title_cn: 中国富人如何规避严格规定将资金转移出国
summary: China’s capital controls remain among the world’s strictest. Individuals are generally limited to transferring $50,000 overseas each year, while emigrants are given a one-time opportunity to move their assets abroad.

title: QXO’s $3 Billion Junk Bond Sale for Takeover Draws Strong Demand
title_cn: QXO 出售 30 亿美元垃圾债券进行收购吸引强劲需求
summary: QXO Building Products Inc.’s $3 billion junk-bond offering to fund its purchase of rival TopBuild Corp. has received more than triple the amount in demand from investors.

title: Emerging-Market Currencies Gain on ‘No News Is Good News’ Day
title_cn: 新兴市场货币在“没有消息就是好消息”日上涨
summary: Most emerging market currencies advanced Tuesday as Iran and the US stepped back from some of the hostile rhetoric that had marked previous days, boosting risk sentiment.

title: Canadian Stocks Index Hits 35,000 Amid Rally in Energy
title_cn: 能源股上涨，加拿大股市指数触及 35,000 点
summary: The Canadian equities benchmark passed 35,000 for the first time on a broadening rally in energy and financials.

title: Gold Rises As Traders Weigh Confusion Over US-Iran Talks
title_cn: 交易员对美伊谈判感到困惑，金价上涨
summary: Axel Merk, founder and CIO of Merk Investments, said that while gold remains a relatively 'calm' investment, the world around the commodity and the geopolitical and economic 'crosscurrents' including AI investment and the war with Iran have created volatility in markets. 	 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Pares Gains as US Jobs Data Reinforces Higher-Rate Bets
title_cn: 美国就业数据加强了高利率押注，黄金价格下跌
summary: Gold pared gains after robust US jobs data reinforced bets that the Federal Reserve will keep interest rates higher for longer, a headwind for the precious metal.

title: Short-Sellers Are Dug In as Bond Market Faces Big Payrolls Test
title_cn: 债券市场面临就业大考验，卖空者陷入困境
summary: Bond traders are locked in to wagers on higher yields even after paring some of their more extreme positions, with critical US employment data due on Friday that may add to the argument for Federal Reserve interest-rate hikes.

title: Momei Qu on Berkshire Hathaway Endorsing AI
title_cn: 曲莫梅谈伯克希尔哈撒韦公司支持人工智能
summary: Momei Qu of PSP Growth discussed the significance of Berkshire Hathaway's recent actions, interpreting them as a strong endorsement of AI as more than just market hype. According to Qu, Berkshire's involvement signals that AI represents a durable infrastructure shift that merits substantial investment. This perspective aligns with Alphabet's announcement to raise $80 billion in equity to fund its AI initiatives, underscoring the growing confidence in AI's transformative potential across industries. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Marvell Soars the Most Since 2000 After $1 Trillion Stock Call
title_cn: Marvell 股票上涨 1 万亿美元，股价创 2000 年以来最大涨幅
summary: Marvell Technology Inc. shares surged the most in 26 years after Nvidia Corp.’s Jensen Huang predicted that the semiconductor and networking company would be the next business to hit a $1 trillion valuation.

title: Victoria’s Secret Stock Rises 47% | Closing Bell
title_cn: 维多利亚的秘密 (Victoria’s Secret) 股价上涨 47% |结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Aberdeen Economist on Falling Brent Crude Prices
title_cn: 阿伯丁经济学家谈布伦特原油价格下跌
summary: Sree Kochugovindan, Senior Research Economist at Aberdeen Investments, focusing on current market sentiment. The recent decline in Brent crude prices, which dropped by 0.72% to $94.30 per barrel. The segment aims to provide insights into the factors influencing investor confidence and market dynamics in the Middle East and Africa region. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: S&P 500 Ties Longest Streak Since 1995 as AI Powers Advance
title_cn: 随着人工智能的进步，标普 500 指数追平 1995 年以来的最长连胜纪录
summary: The S&P 500 Index climbed for a ninth-straight session on Tuesday, matching its longest winning streak since 1995, as traders piled into artificial-intelligence stocks amid developments in the Middle East.

title: Middle Market Businesses 'Real Driver of Economy' Says Wendy Stewart
title_cn: 温迪·斯图尔特表示，中间市场企业是“经济的真正推动者”
summary:
Wendy Stewart, president of Global Commercial Banking at Bank of America, said that middle market businesses are driving the economy right now, driving growth and hiring and firing amid an uncertain economic environment. 
Stewart also said that global supply chains still exist, but that businesses have to be flexible given the geopolitical landscape.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Blue Owl Tech Private Credit Fund Sells $500 Million Bonds
title_cn: Blue Owl Tech 私人信贷基金出售 5 亿美元债券
summary: A private credit fund managed by Blue Owl Capital Inc. sold $500 million of investment-grade bonds on Tuesday, according to a person familiar with the matter.

title: CoreWeave-Tied Data Center Raises $900 Million in Junk-Bond Sale
title_cn: 与 CoreWeave 相关的数据中心通过垃圾债券发行筹集了 9 亿美元
summary: A data center tied to CoreWeave Inc. raised $900 million from a high-yield note offering, joining a wave of junk issuers tapping debt markets to fund artificial intelligence infrastructure.

title: S&P 500 Tops 7,600 as AI Fuels Nine-Day Win Streak: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 人工智能助推九天连胜，标普 500 指数突破 7,600 点：市场总结
summary: A revival of the artificial-intelligence trade kept driving Wall Street momentum, with stocks also rising on hopes for an agreement that would end the war that has roiled financial markets around the world.

title: UBS Sells $1.5 Billion AT1, First Since Swiss Reform Pause
title_cn: 瑞士银行暂停改革以来首次出售 15 亿美元 AT1
summary: UBS Group AG raised $1.5 billion of Additional Tier 1 capital in US dollars, its first foray into the market since Switzerland paused plans to tighten rules on the riskiest type of bank debt.

title: Copper and Aluminum Power Higher on Global Demand, War Outlook
title_cn: 铜和铝电力因全球需求和战争前景而走高
summary: Copper topped $14,000 a ton and aluminum advanced to its highest in more than four years as optimism over demand and supply constraints outweighed concerns over the unresolved conflict in the Middle East.

title: Cliffwater Private Credit Fund Stung by 17% Redemption Requests
title_cn: Cliffwater 私人信贷基金因 17% 的赎回请求而受到影响
summary: Cliffwater LLC’s flagship private credit fund capped redemptions at 5% in the second quarter after investors looked to pull about 17% of shares, in a sign of enduring pressure on the $1.8 trillion market.

title: Treasuries Pare Gains After Jobs Openings Back Rate-Hike View
title_cn: 职位空缺回升加息观点后，国债涨幅回落
summary: Treasuries retreated from near their best levels of the past month as the first of three labor-market reports this week backed wagers that the Federal Reserve’s next move will be to raise interest rates.

title: Oil Swings Higher as Traders Weigh Prospects of US-Iran Deal
title_cn: 交易员权衡美伊协议前景，油价波动走高
summary: Oil edged higher as traders parsed discordant signals on the prospects of a US-Iran peace deal.

title: Traders Most Bullish on Yuan in 15 Years, Options Pricing Shows
title_cn: 期权定价显示，交易员15年来最看好人民币
summary: Traders ramped up wagers on a stronger yuan in the coming year, betting that increased global usage and an attractive valuation will guide China’s currency through near-term speed bumps.

title: Goldman's Solomon Sees More Greed Than Fear in Markets
title_cn: 高盛所罗门认为市场上的贪婪多于恐惧
summary: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon says a boom in equity markets is being driven by an appetite for profit that’s outweighing fears about economic disruption and inflation risks. He speaks during an appearance at the Economic Club of New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Valve, the Anticorporate Hero of the Games Industry, Has Its Antitrust Moment
title_cn: Valve，游戏行业的反企业英雄，迎来了反垄断时刻
summary: Lawsuits in the US and the UK allege the company’s Steam store is abusing its market power. Valve disagrees.

title: Back On Being Bitcoin Creator: 'Hard to Prove Negative'
title_cn: 重返比特币创造者：“很难证明消极”
summary: Adam Back, co-founder and CEO of Blockstream, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Back is often considered to be the creator of Bitcoin, which he has repeatedly denied. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NYU’s Gary Marcus: Today Marks a US AI Policy Milestone
title_cn: 纽约大学的加里·马库斯：今天标志着美国人工智能政策的里程碑
summary: Gary Marcus, NYU Emeritus Professor of Psychology and Neural Science and founder of Robust.AI and Geometric.AI, joined the program to discuss the recent executive order on AI regulation. He described the order as a significant reversal from the previous administration's hands-off approach, which he viewed as untenable. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Prediction Market Bettors Lagging Sports Gamblers: Report
title_cn: 预测市场投注者落后于体育投注者：报告
summary: Bloomberg's Ira Boudway joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Traders on prediction markets fare worse than traditional sports bettors on increasingly popular multi-leg wagers, according to an analysis by Citizens. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Toilet Maker Toto Ramps Up Foray Into Ceramic Gear for AI Makers
title_cn: 马桶制造商 Toto 加大进军人工智能制造商陶瓷设备领域
summary: Japanese toilet maker Toto Ltd. expects spending in its chip-related operations to make up more than half its total capex in coming years, as it chases new gains from an artificial intelligence surge.

title: Fireblocks CEO Discusses Flow Launch, Payment Growth
title_cn: Fireblocks 首席执行官讨论 Flow 推出和支付增长
summary: Michael Shaulov, CEO of Fireblocks, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Fireblocks, the crypto infrastructure company launched Fireblocks Flow today as part of the Money 20/20 conference in Amsterdam.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Musk Allies Back Ex-DOGE Staffers Trying to Use AI to Cut Waste
title_cn: 马斯克盟友支持前 DOGE 员工尝试使用人工智能减少浪费
summary: Two former staffers from the Department of Government Efficiency have unveiled a new venture to buy companies and cut waste by implementing artificial intelligence, applying DOGE’s cost-cutting project to the private sector.

title: Clients Looking for Asset Distribution: Dixon
title_cn: 寻求资产分配的客户：Dixon
summary:
Denelle Dixon, CEO of Stellar Development Foundation, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation said last week it plans to connect its tokenized securities platform to the Stellar network. 

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Palo Alto Networks Raises Profit Outlook, Citing AI Demand
title_cn: Palo Alto Networks 以人工智能需求为由上调利润预期
summary: Palo Alto Networks Inc. released a forecast for adjusted earnings that was stronger than anticipated, signaling ongoing demand for security services as artificial intelligence-related threats continue to raise concerns for companies and governments.

title: HPE Soars by Record After Raising AI-Fueled Sales Forecast
title_cn: 上调人工智能驱动的销售预测后，HPE 股价飙升创纪录
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co. shares had their best day ever after the company gave an outlook for annual sales that topped Wall Street’s estimates, citing massive growth in AI-fueled demand for its servers and networking.

title: Prosus Gets Until Oct. 11 for Delivery Hero Sale After Uber Bid
title_cn: Prosus 在 Uber 竞标后于 10 月 11 日之前进行“Delivery Hero”促销
summary: The European Commission is planning to extend a critical deadline for Prosus NV to sell down a stake in Delivery Hero SE to October, buying the investor some meaningful time to thwart another possible takeover attempt of the food delivery service by Uber Technologies Inc.

title: Uber Caps Usage of AI Tools Like Claude Code to Manage Costs
title_cn: Uber 限制使用 Claude Code 等人工智能工具来管理成本
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. has set usage caps on some artificial intelligence-powered tools used by its staff, a move meant to manage costs after the company blew through its AI budget earlier this year.

title: Franklin Templeton Moves More Business Onto Blockchain
title_cn: 富兰克林邓普顿将更多业务转移到区块链上
summary: Jenny Johnson, CEO of Franklin Templeton, and Adam Back, co-founder and CEO of Blockstream, talk about the recent drop in Bitcoin prices, institutional demand for crypto and how Franklin Templeton is moving more business functions onto the blockchain. They spoke with Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Walmart-Backed Fintech Uses Retailer’s Reach to Challenge Banks
title_cn: 沃尔玛支持的金融科技利用零售商的影​​响力挑战银行
summary: Bloomberg's Paige Smith joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Walmart is one of the last remaining merchants that's been able to hold out against the swell of Apple Pay in recent years. Now, it's pushing a fledgling alternative to its huge trove of customers and employees. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Galaxy Digital Sets Up Prediction Market OTC Derivatives Des
title_cn: Galaxy Digital 设立预测市场场外衍生品设计
summary: Bloomberg's Bernard Goyder joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Crypto finance conglomerate Galaxy Digital Inc. has launched a trading desk to offer large investors better access to prediction markets via over-the-counter derivatives similar to those used in markets from interest rates to commodities. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dimon Slams Coinbase’s Armstrong In Crypto Bill Fight
title_cn: 戴蒙在加密货币法案之争中猛烈抨击 Coinbase 的阿姆斯特朗
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence's Nathan Dean joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Jamie Dimon took aim at Coinbase Global CEO Brian Armstrong, and vowed to fight back against digital-asset legislation making its way through Congress. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Franklin Templeton Expert Ting Highlights Enduring Strength of Korean & Taiwanese Markets
title_cn: 富兰克林邓普顿专家丁强调韩国和台湾市场的持久实力
summary: Dina Ting, Head of Global Index Portfolio Management at Franklin Templeton, discussed the ongoing global tech rally led by markets in South Korea and Taiwan, particularly in the semiconductor sector supporting AI development. She emphasized that unlike some concerns about overheated valuations in the U.S. tech market, the semiconductor ecosystems in Korea and Taiwan are more resilient and built for the long term. She speaks to Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Investors Rethink Strategies Amid Mega IPOs
title_cn: 投资者在大型首次公开募股中重新思考策略
summary: Anthropic has confidentially filed to go public, pulling ahead of rival OpenAI in the IPO race, this as SpaceX gets ready to IPO this month. Emily Zheng, a senior venture capital research analyst at PitchBook, says "we are in unchartered territory" in terms of how "gargantuan" these mega IPOs are. She joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft Launches AI That Works Like an Executive Assistant
title_cn: 微软推出像行政助理一样工作的人工智能
summary: Microsoft Corp. launched new artificial intelligence software designed to function like an always-active executive assistant, the latest evolution of its workplace AI efforts.

title: Dimon Sounds Off, Prediction Markets vs. Sports Betting | Bloomberg Crypto 6/2/2026
title_cn: 戴蒙的声音听起来不太对劲，预测市场与体育博彩|彭博加密货币 6/2/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Crypto" covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance. Today's guests: Blockstream CEO & Co-Founder Adam Back, Franklin Templeton CEO Jenny Johnson, Stellar Development Foundation CEO Denelle Dixon, and Fireblocks CEO Michael Shaulox. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alphabet To Raise $80B in Equity, Anthropic Files For IPO | Bloomberg Tech 6/2/2026
title_cn: Alphabet 将筹集 80B 美元股权，Anthropic 申请 IPO |彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 2 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow break down why Alphabet wants to raise $80 billion in equity to fund AI infrastructure expansion, while Anthropic makes its IPO move and files confidentially to go public, pulling ahead of rival OpenAI in the IPO race. Plus, Elon Musk's SpaceX is negotiating to pay razor-thin fees to Wall Street firms handling its IPO. And, HPE CEO Antonio Neri joins on the company's annual sales outlook beating estimates on the back of massive AI infrastructure demand. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft’s New Quantum Chip Aiming for Useful Machine in 2029
title_cn: 微软新量子芯片瞄准 2029 年实用机器
summary: Microsoft Corp. announced an updated quantum-computing chip, betting it can set up a commercially useful machine by 2029.

title: Microsoft’s Project Solara Aims to Put AI in an Employee Badge
title_cn: 微软的 Project Solara 旨在将人工智能融入员工徽章中
summary: Microsoft Corp. introduced a new set of software tools designed to take artificial intelligence agents off of laptop screens and place them in mobile devices for businesses.

title: AI Fuels $280 Billion Cybersecurity Rally as Earnings Test Looms
title_cn: 随着盈利测试的临近，人工智能推动网络安全上涨 2800 亿美元
summary: Investors are about to get a read on the durability of the soaring rally in cybersecurity stocks when two of the industry’s major players report earnings in the coming days.

title: Anthropic’s First-Mover IPO Edge Set to Widen Lead Over OpenAI
title_cn: Anthropic 的先行者 IPO 优势将扩大对 OpenAI 的领先优势
summary:
Anthropic PBC pulled ahead of OpenAI with its confidential IPO filing Monday, as the free-spending artificial intelligence startups battle for a fundraising edge that’s set to determine who will win the ultimate battle for computing power.

The oneupmanship in the firms’ private funding rounds, and now their progress toward going public, isn’t just about bragging rights. The risk for both firms is that the first to tap the US market’s unparalleled depth and liquidity will gain an immediate advantage in securing access to the chips, data centers and talent needed to build their AI models.

With Elon Musk looking to turbocharge SpaceX’s nascent AI offerings by strapping them to a hyperscaler with a chipmaker joint venture and doing an IPO, OpenAI and Anthropic can’t risk falling behind. Bloomberg Intelligence's Matthew Bloxham takes a closer look. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indie Video Game ‘Mina the Hollower’ Sells 300,000 Copies in Three Days
title_cn: 独立视频游戏《Mina the Hollower》三天内售出 30 万份
summary: The new action-platformer is the best-reviewed video game of 2026 so far

title: Trump to Drop $1.8 Billion Fund in IRS Deal, Keeps Tax Probe Ban
title_cn: 特朗普将在国税局协议中放弃 18 亿美元资金，并维持税收调查禁令
summary: The Trump administration is moving to drop controversial plans for a $1.8 billion fund to pay victims of alleged government “weaponization,” but will still provide immunity from any probes into the president’s past tax filings under a deal agreed to last month.

title: Mexican Teachers Threaten to Disrupt World Cup Over Wages
title_cn: 墨西哥教师威胁要因工资问题扰乱世界杯
summary: Mexican teachers seeking higher wages are threatening to disrupt World Cup games, piling pressure on organizers already facing questions over airport capacity, traffic congestion and security risks in some host cities.

title: South Korea’s Lee Faces First Election Test One Year Into Office
title_cn: 韩国李明博上任一年后面临首次选举考验
summary: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung faces his first electoral test a year into his term with local votes that could boost his party’s influence throughout the nation or show the limitations of his appeal as the main opposition party tries to rebuild itself.

title: Trump’s Netanyahu Problem Is Latest Key Hurdle to Iran Deal
title_cn: 特朗普的内塔尼亚胡问题是伊朗协议的最新关键障碍
summary: President Donald Trump has spent months projecting confidence that a deal to end the Iran conflict is within reach. Israel’s determination to press ahead with its own objectives underscores his tenuous control over the outcome of the crisis.

title: US Appeals Trade Court Order for Broad IEEPA Tariff Refunds
title_cn: 美国上诉贸易法院命令要求广泛 IEEPA 关税退款
summary: The Trump administration has formally appealed a judge’s order compelling customs authorities to refund all importers who paid the $166 billion in global tariffs that the US Supreme Court declared unlawful earlier this year.

title: Rep. Subramanyam Warns Pulte Risks Politicize Intelligence
title_cn: 众议员苏布拉马尼亚姆警告普尔特风险将情报政治化
summary: Rep. Suhas Subramanyam (D-VA), ranking member on the House Oversight Subcommittee on Military and Foreign Affairs, says FHFA chief Bill Pulte is "absolutely not qualified" to serve as acting director of national intelligence and expects the Trump administration to rely more on acting officials to advance the president's agenda without Senate confirmation. Subramanyam also weighs in on the Justice Department's scrapped $1.8 billion "anti-weaponization" fund and Trump's executive order creating a voluntary review process for advanced AI models. He speaks with Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jailed Tunisian Opposition Leader Sentenced to Life in Prison
title_cn: 被监禁的突尼斯反对派领袖被判处终身监禁
summary: A Tunisian court sentenced Rached El Ghannouchi, leader of the largest opposition group, Ennahda, to life in prison, adding to his previous jail terms totaling dozens of years in connection to earlier cases brought against him under President Kais Saied.

title: Blanche Says Trump to Drop $1.8 Billion Anti-Weaponization Fund
title_cn: 布兰奇称特朗普将放弃 18 亿美元反武器化基金
summary: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche says the Trump administration will drop plans for a $1.8 billion fund to pay victims of alleged government “weaponization” following a backlash from both Democratic and Republican lawmakers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Californians Vote in Nail-Biter $300 Million Race for Newsom’s Successor
title_cn: 加州人为纽森的继任者投票 3 亿美元
summary: California’s governor primary, often a sleepy affair that has a Democratic favorite quickly emerging to lead the deep-blue state, is heading to its close as a nail-biter shaped by billionaire money, scandal and uncertainty.

title: Fmr. Morocco Ambassador: ‘Time Is on Our Side’ With Iran
title_cn: 先生。摩洛哥大使：与伊朗“时间站在我们一边”
summary: Former US Ambassador to Morocco and Senior Iran Adviser to President Obama, Puneet Talwar, discussed the complexities surrounding ongoing US-Iran negotiations for an interim deal. Despite reports of suspended talks due to fighting in Lebanon, President Trump remains optimistic about continuous conversations with Iran. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed’s Warsh Taps Conservatives Winfree, Heil as Advisers
title_cn: 美联储沃什任命保守派人士温弗里和海尔为顾问
summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh has hired conservative policy analysts Paul Winfree and Daniel Heil as temporary advisers, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: HPE, Alphabet Signal AI Spend, Demand Remains High | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/2/2026
title_cn: HPE、Alphabet Signal AI 支出、需求仍然很高 |彭博商业周刊日报 6/2/2026
summary: Bloomberg's Jeff Mason on the latest from Washington the president names Bill Pulte acting Director of National Intelligence. Then, Robert Tipp, PGIM Fixed Income managing director, chief investment strategist, and PGIM Credit's head of global bonds discusses what the volatile macro environment means for the bond market and how the market is reacting to record AI spend. Plus, Mandeep Singh, Bloomberg Intelligence global head of technology research,  breaks down the latest tech headlines including the latest on SpaceX and Anthropic IPOs and Alphabet's plan to raise $80 billion in equity to put toward the company's AI spending. Finally, Wendy Stewart, president of Global Commercial Banking at Bank of America, talks how middle market businesses are navigating an uncertain economic landscape. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Sanctions Iran’s Top Crypto Exchange in Ongoing Push for Deal
title_cn: 美国制裁伊朗顶级加密货币交易所，持续推动达成协议
summary: The Trump administration sanctioned Iran’s biggest cryptocurrency exchange and three other entities in a continued effort to pressure the Islamic Republic into a deal to wind down President Donald Trump’s war.

title: Jared Bernstein on California’s Critical Primary Elections
title_cn: 贾里德·伯恩斯坦谈加州关键的初选
summary: Jared Bernstein, former chair at the Council of Economic Advisors and now a senior fellow at the Center for American Progress, discusses the role of economic issues in the upcoming primary elections. With several states, including California, holding primaries on June 2nd, Bernstein addresses whether economic concerns are motivating voters to participate in the primaries. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Burnham Canceled Hedge Fund Call During UK Election Campaign
title_cn: 伯纳姆在英国竞选期间取消了对冲基金的电话会议
summary: Andy Burnham canceled a call with hedge fund managers this week that was due to discuss fiscal policy and the bond market, as the would-be UK premier continued his campaign to win a seat in Parliament.

title: Pulte’s Spy Agency Role Seen Undercutting Trump Housing Agenda
title_cn: 普尔特的间谍机构角色被视为削弱特朗普的住房议程
summary: President Donald Trump’s decision to tap his top housing regulator to also serve as acting Director of National Intelligence threatens to sideline an already-sputtering home affordability agenda five months before the US midterm elections.

title: Iraq to Boost Ceyhan Oil Exports as Hormuz Strait Remains Shut
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡仍然关闭，伊拉克将增加杰伊汉石油出口
summary: Iraq is poised to more than triple crude exports through a pipeline in the semi-autonomous Kurdistan region, as the OPEC nation seeks to alleviate the impact of the effective blockage of the Strait of Hormuz on its oil revenue.

title: Graham Platner, Facing Latest Scandal, Tries to Shore Up DC Support
title_cn: 格雷厄姆·普拉特纳（Graham Platner）面对最新丑闻，试图支持华盛顿特区的支持
summary: The Democratic Senate candidate is taking time off the campaign trail to reassure lawmakers.

title: Rubio Defends Iran War, Ebola Response in Combative Hearings
title_cn: 卢比奥在听证会上为伊朗战争和埃博拉应对措施辩护
summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio defended the US war effort in Iran, as well as the Trump administration’s global public health strategy amid a worsening Ebola outbreak, as he faced hostile questions from Democrats in two hearings before Congress on Tuesday.

title: Homeland’s Mullin Signals Flexibility on $100,000 H-1B Visa Fees
title_cn: Homeland 的 Mullin 表示将灵活调整 10 万美元的 H-1B 签证费用
summary: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin said his department has flexibility to provide relief in some cases from a new $100,000 H-1B visa fee, offering employers a potentially friendlier message on legal immigration channels amid the Trump administration’s broader crackdown.

title: Trump Takes Hands-Off Approach to AI Cybersecurity in New Order
title_cn: 特朗普以新秩序对人工智能网络安全采取放手态度
summary: President Donald Trump outlined a hands-off approach to addressing cybersecurity threats raised by artificial intelligence under an executive order that calls for giving the US government voluntary access to AI models.

title: DeSantis Plan to Cut Florida Property Taxes Heads to Ballot
title_cn: 德桑蒂斯削减佛罗里达州财产税的计划即将进行投票
summary: Florida lawmakers have approved a stripped-down version of a proposal from Gov. Ron DeSantis (R) to slash property taxes, removing local school districts from the plan.

title: Israel's Lebanon Push Threatens Iran Deal | Balance of Power: Early Edition 6/2/2026
title_cn: 以色列对黎巴嫩的推动威胁伊朗协议权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 6 月 2 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest news from the Trump Administration. On today's show, Council on Foreign Relations Senior Fellow Elisa Ewers, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino and Sabato's Crystal Ball Managing Editor Kyle Kondik. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Canada Envoys Visit Venezuela as Carney Weighs Reopening Embassy
title_cn: 卡尼考虑重新开放大使馆，加拿大特使访问委内瑞拉
summary: Canadian diplomats traveled to Venezuela last week as Mark Carney’s government mulls restoring formal ties after the US operation to remove President Nicolás Maduro.

title: Redistricting in Focus As Six States Hold Primaries
title_cn: 六个州举行初选，重新选区成为焦点
summary: Kyle Kondik, Managing Editor of Sabato's Crystal Ball at University of Virginia's Center for Politics joined Balance of Power as six states with 74 congressional districts hold primaries today.  In California, this is the first election under the state’s revamped congressional map enacted by Democrats last year in response to mid-decade gerrymandering in Texas and other Republican states. California Democrats could win up to 48 districts, a net gain of five that would lift their chances of winning a House majority. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mamdani Picks Ex-Transport Chief, Former Budget Director for MTA
title_cn: 马姆达尼任命 MTA 前运输主管、前预算总监
summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani picked Janette Sadik-Khan, a former transportation official in the Bloomberg administration, and Melanie Hartzog, the city’s former budget director, to the board of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority.

title: Trump Picks Loyalist Pulte as Acting Spy Chief After Gabbard
title_cn: 特朗普任命效忠派普尔特继加巴德之后担任代理间谍首长
summary: President Donald Trump appointed Bill Pulte, the head of the Federal Housing Finance Agency, as the acting director of National Intelligence, elevating a loyalist with no national-security background to US spy chief.

title: Ken Paxton to Meet Trump at White House as Senate Race Heats Up
title_cn: 随着参议院竞选升温，肯·帕克斯顿将在白宫会见特朗普
summary: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton will meet Tuesday with President Donald Trump at the White House as the Republican Senate nominee tries to consolidate his support and boost fundraising in one of the country’s most competitive midterm races.

title: Colombia’s Pro-Trump Presidential Frontrunner Thrills Investors
title_cn: 哥伦比亚亲特朗普总统领跑者令投资者兴奋不已
summary: Exuberant market reaction to a celebrity lawyer’s surprise victory in Colombia’s first-round election Sunday is sowing expectations for an investment rebound in the resource-rich Andean country.
